title: Selling Your Car: How Long Do Listings Stay Live on BuyAndScrap.com?
metaDescription: Find out exactly how long your car listing stays live on BuyAndScrap.com. We offer a clear 28-day period with simple renewal options. Sell your car hassle-free!
targetKeyword: how long do listings stay live
content:
Your car listing on BuyAndScrap.com stays live for 28 days. This standard period helps keep our marketplace fresh and current. If your car hasn't sold, renewing your advert is quick and easy. We'll send you a reminder before it expires.

## How Long Do Car Listings Stay Live on BuyAndScrap.com?

When you list your car with us, your advert is active for 28 days. This is our standard listing period. It ensures potential buyers always see available cars, not outdated listings.

From our experience, 28 days offers a good window. It gives your car plenty of exposure. It also encourages active selling, helping you achieve a faster sale.

## Why a 28-Day Listing Period Works

We've found this timeframe benefits everyone. It creates a dynamic and efficient marketplace for honest, affordable cars. Our aim is to connect serious buyers with serious sellers quickly.

### Keeping Buyers Happy

Buyers see a fresh marketplace with genuine cars ready to go. This avoids 'ghost listings' for cars already sold. It ensures a better browsing experience on [BuyAndScrap.com](/cars).

### Empowering Sellers

For sellers, it means your advert gets serious attention. If your car hasn't sold, it's a prompt to review your price or photos. We want your [Sell Your Car](/sell) journey to be smooth and successful.

## Need More Time? Renewing Your Car Listing is Easy

Sometimes a car takes a little longer to find its perfect owner. That's perfectly normal. If your car hasn't sold in 28 days, don't worry.

We make extending your listing straightforward. Before your advert expires, we'll email you a friendly reminder. You can then renew your listing for another 28 days with a few simple clicks.

This keeps your car visible without needing to create a whole new advert. It's designed to keep you in control and make selling easy. Find more tips in our [Guides](/guides) section.

## What Happens When Your Listing Expires?

If you choose not to renew, your advert automatically leaves public view. It won't be seen by new buyers browsing our marketplace. However, your listing details remain safe in your BuyAndScrap.com account.

You can access these details at any time. This means you can relist your car later if you change your mind. We aim for transparency in all our processes.

## FAQs About Listing Your Car

**Q: Can I remove my listing before 28 days?**
A: Yes, absolutely. You can remove your car listing at any point before the 28 days are up. Simply log into your BuyAndScrap.com account and manage your active adverts with ease.

**Q: Do I get charged for renewing my listing?**
A: Renewing your listing for another 28 days is often free of charge. We'll clearly outline any costs, if applicable, when we send your renewal reminder. Our goal is to make selling your car affordable.

**Q: How can I make my car sell faster?**
A: To help your car sell quickly, ensure your photos are high quality and your description is honest. Price it competitively by researching similar cars. A valid MOT is also key; check yours with our [Free MOT Checker](/mot-checker).

Ready to find your next car?
